about:
Hello! I am Dung Nguyen, a Senior Software Engineer / Tech Lead from Hanoi, Vietnam.

I build backend-heavy systems and product integrations where reliability, correctness, and delivery speed all matter at the same time. Over the years, I have worked across finance, forex, cryptocurrency, accounting, healthcare, and commerce.

In recent years, I have focused deeply on Shopify and payment-related systems — building custom themes, embedded apps, and regional payment integrations using Remix, Node.js, Java, and TypeScript. That work has included multi-store architectures, asynchronous payment flows, webhook-driven lifecycle handling, subscription systems, and market-specific gateways such as ETH/Web3 checkout and GMO bank transfer for Japan.

My strongest value is as an engineer who can also do architecture: I enjoy designing clean system boundaries, thinking through failure modes, and turning complex operational problems into solutions that are practical to build and support. I am strongest on the backend, but I am comfortable working across the stack when the product needs it, including React and the portfolio site you are reading now.
